case_title: MARK H. FITHIAN VS. SUSAN GOODMAN INC.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF FITHIAN, MARK H. AS TO DEFENDANT SUSAN GOODMAN INC. A NEW YORK CORPORATION DBA GOODMAN & COMPANY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FITHIAN, MARK H. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SUSAN GOODMAN INC. A NEW YORK CORPORATION DBA GOODMAN & COMPANY $142,569.50 PRINCIPAL, $1,104.15 INTEREST, $410.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $144,083.65, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
